issues.sample: Left underbody panel tore. Available for inspection. Exposed wiring, servos, cables, etc. confirmed. Replaced panel at my expense by dealer. Manufacturer notified.Neither will reimburse me. No alerts.  Occurred about 3/2/25. Cause: asphalt driveway twig caught in 1-2” gap between

narrative.headline: What 2024 Aston Martin Dbx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (100% of reports).
